scope.summary: Author cross-repo-evidence-contract-v1: four versioned schemas, negative fixtures, and an offline validator.
out_of_scope: Producing real proofs: the commands that emit these documents are separate beads.
Wiring the contract check into a CI workflow.

entry_points.name: scripts/check_evidence_contract.sh
entry_points.trace: Runs the fixture suite end to end and exits non-zero when any rule stops firing.

limitations: The semantic layer is re-implemented per repo; only the schema files and rule codes are shared, so the two implementations can drift in message text.
The structural validator implements the subset of draft 2020-12 these schemas use, not the whole specification.
